protein_name: Glycosyltransferase that initiates the elongation of O-linked fucose residues attached to EGF-like repeats in the extracellular domain of Notch molecules. Modulates NOTCH1 activity by modifying O-fucose residues at specific EGF-like domains resulting in enhancement of NOTCH1 activation by DLL1 and JAG1. May be involved in limb formation and in neurogenesis. Belongs to the glycosyltransferase 31 family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: EC 2.4.1.222; Membrane protein, integral; Motility/polarity/chemotaxis; Transferase
raw_fields.Molecular Function: glycosyltransferase activity; metal ion binding; O-fucosylpeptide 3-beta-N-acetylglucosaminyltransferase activity; transferase activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: animal organ morphogenesis; cell differentiation; nervous system development; pattern specification process; regulation of Notch signaling pathway
